--- title: "TDM Run Results" subtitle: "Wasatch Front Regional Travel Demand Model — Run Set Reporting" --- Generated from committed run metadata under `runs/`. A new run set appears here automatically once it has at least one committed run. ## non-motorized-2023 *Prepared by Bill Hereth · last updated 2026-07-02* Non-motorized network sensitivity test — 13 scenarios varying HH and EMP at different multipliers and spatial scopes to quantify mode-choice response to localized land-use changes. Manually curated from pre-existing scenario outputs (not run through the `tdmruns` CLI), so it's linked directly here rather than through the generic run-metadata table below. - [Slides view](run_sets/non-motorized-2023/slides.html) - [Summary view](run_sets/non-motorized-2023/summary.html) ## [non-motorized-2023](run_sets/non-motorized-2023.qmd) *Prepared by Bill Hereth · last updated 2026-07-02* Non-motorized network sensitivity test — 13 scenarios varying HH and EMP at different multipliers and spatial scopes (specific TAZs, small districts, or region-wide) to quantify mode-choice response to localized land-use changes.
